stories.loveLetter:
My dearest Ananya,

I spent so many nights thinking about how to show you how much you mean to me. This little corner of the internet is just a small reflection of the universe of love I have for you.

From the first time we talked to our latest laugh, every second with you feels like a beautiful dream I never want to wake up from. You are my Maalikn, my best friend, and my greatest adventure.

I call you Kuchu, Phuchku, and everything in between, but most of all, I call you mine. Thank you for being you, for your kindness, and for choosing me every single day.

I love you more than words can ever say.

Always yours,
Sujal

whyILoveYou.title: Your Smile
whyILoveYou.description: It lights up my whole world and makes every problem disappear, my sweet Kuchu.

whyILoveYou.title: Your Kindness
whyILoveYou.description: The way you care for everyone around you is truly inspiring, Madamji.

whyILoveYou.title: Your Support
whyILoveYou.description: You're always there for me, my biggest cheerleader and best friend, Maalikn.

whyILoveYou.title: Your Laugh
whyILoveYou.description: The most beautiful melody I've ever heard. It's contagious, Phuchku!

whyILoveYou.title: Your Presence
whyILoveYou.description: Just being near you makes everything feel right and peaceful, my dear Kuchu.

whyILoveYou.title: Your Strength
whyILoveYou.description: You handle everything with such grace and courage, Madamji. I'm so proud of you.

moments.title: The First Gaze
moments.description: Where it all started. Little did I know how much you'd mean to me, Kuchu.

moments.title: First Laugh Together
moments.description: That moment I realized we had something truly special, Madamji.

moments.title: First Photo Together
moments.description: Capturing a moment that will stay in my heart forever, Maalikn.

moments.title: Countless Memories
moments.description: Every day with you is a new favorite memory, Phuchku. I love you!

photos.caption: Every moment with you is a gift, Kuchu
Your smile is my favorite view, Madamji
Holding your hand, always and forever
